text: and obese people in the community and the resulting burden of chronic non-communicable diseases necessitate systematic nutrition educational interventions on a massive scale. There is a need for adoption of healthy dietary guidelines along with strong emphasis on regular physical exercise. Today, the multiple sources of health and nutrition related information tend to create unnecessary confusion among people. This book makes an attempt to inform us on matters of everyday nutrition in a user friendly manner and thus, aims to influence our dietary behavior. These guidelines deal with nutritional requirements of people during all stages of their life, right from infancy to old age. We earnestly hope that readers will enjoy reading the book and benefit from it and also spread the valuable
